					<div class="entry-content wp-block-post-content has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-post-content-is-layout-constrained"><p><img data-attachment-id="625" data-permalink="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/2017/05/18/ntu-life-top-16-best-campus-food-at-ntu/5-2-2/" data-orig-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/05/5-2.jpg" data-orig-size="640,451" data-comments-opened="1" data-image-meta="{"aperture":"0","credit":"","camera":"","caption":"","created_timestamp":"1493469816","copyright":"","focal_length":"0","iso":"0","shutter_speed":"0","title":"","orientation":"1"}" data-image-title="5 (2)" data-image-description="" data-image-caption="" data-large-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/05/5-2.jpg?w=640" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-625" src="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/05/5-2.jpg?w=640&h=451" alt="5 (2)" width="640" height="451" srcset="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/05/5-2.jpg 640w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/05/5-2.jpg?w=150&h=106 150w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/05/5-2.jpg?w=300&h=211 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></p>
<p>It has been a while since my last post about my exchange lifein Singapore. I am still in the middle of catching up with all the blog posts I wanted to write (expect posts about Taiwan, Macau and Singapore soon). For now, I thought it would be really neat to write a post about my favorite meal options at NTU and for any students here, what should be considered must try.<span id="more-528"></span></p>
<p>I am an international student doing an exchange semester abroad in Singapore for the Spring 2017 semester. When it comes to food, I like it flavorful and sometime, spicy. Which is perfect because most stalls at NTU suits my taste buds. Plus, everything is so cheap (expect 2$-7$ range)! As food stalls open, move and close often here, hopefully, these stalls will still exist by the time the reader reads this post. Although there is no quantitative rating, I decided to order this list from favorite meal at the top top. Overall, don’t worry, everything on this post is my favorites.</p>

</ol>
<p>Furthermore, as I was living in the hall 10 area and taking my classes at North Spine, most of my meals were actually eaten at places that are close and easily accessible. Here are 4 extra meal choices I love to get for these reasons:</p>
<ol>
<li>At 2.80$, Soup Ban Mian at North Spine Food Court. This is always a favorite when you want to have a heartfelt good meal without breaking your wallet.</li>
</ol>
<p><a href="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/ban-mian.jpg"><img data-attachment-id="545" data-permalink="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/2017/05/18/ntu-life-top-16-best-campus-food-at-ntu/ban-mian/" data-orig-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/ban-mian.jpg" data-orig-size="640,640" data-comments-opened="1" data-image-meta="{"aperture":"0","credit":"","camera":"","caption":"","created_timestamp":"0","copyright":"","focal_length":"0","iso":"0","shutter_speed":"0","title":"","orientation":"0"}" data-image-title="ban mian" data-image-description="" data-image-caption="" data-large-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/ban-mian.jpg?w=640" loading="lazy" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-545" src="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/ban-mian.jpg?w=640&h=640" alt="" width="640" height="640" srcset="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/ban-mian.jpg 640w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/ban-mian.jpg?w=150&h=150 150w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/ban-mian.jpg?w=300&h=300 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></a></p>
<p>2. For around 3.00$, try the Mixed Rice aka Cai Fan at Canteen 11. Excluding canteen 11, I would also recommend canteen 13 and North Spine’s mixed rice options.</p>
<p><a href="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/mixed-rice.jpg"><img data-attachment-id="546" data-permalink="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/2017/05/18/ntu-life-top-16-best-campus-food-at-ntu/mixed-rice/" data-orig-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/mixed-rice.jpg" data-orig-size="640,640" data-comments-opened="1" data-image-meta="{"aperture":"0","credit":"","camera":"","caption":"","created_timestamp":"0","copyright":"","focal_length":"0","iso":"0","shutter_speed":"0","title":"","orientation":"0"}" data-image-title="Mixed Rice" data-image-description="" data-image-caption="" data-large-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/mixed-rice.jpg?w=640" loading="lazy" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-546" src="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/mixed-rice.jpg?w=640&h=640" alt="" width="640" height="640" srcset="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/mixed-rice.jpg 640w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/mixed-rice.jpg?w=150&h=150 150w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/mixed-rice.jpg?w=300&h=300 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></a></p>
<p>3. For 3.80$, if you have a small appetite, but is craving for some really good pasta, go try the black pepper beef pasta from canteen 9. The secret is the sauce: it is super delicious.</p>
<p><a href="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/pasta.jpg"><img data-attachment-id="547" data-permalink="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/2017/05/18/ntu-life-top-16-best-campus-food-at-ntu/pasta/" data-orig-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/pasta.jpg" data-orig-size="640,640" data-comments-opened="1" data-image-meta="{"aperture":"0","credit":"","camera":"","caption":"","created_timestamp":"0","copyright":"","focal_length":"0","iso":"0","shutter_speed":"0","title":"","orientation":"0"}" data-image-title="pasta" data-image-description="" data-image-caption="" data-large-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/pasta.jpg?w=640" loading="lazy" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-547" src="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/pasta.jpg?w=640&h=640" alt="" width="640" height="640" srcset="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/pasta.jpg 640w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/pasta.jpg?w=150&h=150 150w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/pasta.jpg?w=300&h=300 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></a></p>
<p>4. Finally, my feel good meal is the You Po Mian from the Xian Noodles place at canteen 9. At only 2.70$, it is a complete meal with generous portion of hand-pulled noodles and delicious veggies. I normally order it without spicy sauce because they put too much even if the dish already has a good portion of Chinese soy sauce.</p>
<p><a href="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/yo.jpg"><img data-attachment-id="548" data-permalink="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/2017/05/18/ntu-life-top-16-best-campus-food-at-ntu/yo/" data-orig-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/yo.jpg" data-orig-size="640,640" data-comments-opened="1" data-image-meta="{"aperture":"0","credit":"","camera":"","caption":"","created_timestamp":"0","copyright":"","focal_length":"0","iso":"0","shutter_speed":"0","title":"","orientation":"0"}" data-image-title="yo" data-image-description="" data-image-caption="" data-large-file="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/yo.jpg?w=640" loading="lazy" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-548" src="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/yo.jpg?w=640&h=640" alt="" width="640" height="640" srcset="https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/yo.jpg 640w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/yo.jpg?w=150&h=150 150w, https://catharticstudent.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/yo.jpg?w=300&h=300 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></a></p>
